productName: Vant Lynx - Vue Mobile Components for Lynx
description: Slopfork Vant (youzan/vant) to create Lynx-native Vue mobile components. Each component is ported from Vant and adapted for Lynx rendering.

rules: Use lynxbase skill to query Lynx APIs when unsure (getBoundingClientRect, IntersectionObserver, etc.)
Decide per-component: background thread events (bindtap) vs main thread events (main-thread-bindtouchstart)
Simple tap/click handlers → background thread; gesture-heavy/animation → main thread
Use Lynx for Web preview + browser for testing, NOT DevTool CLI
Use Less for styling (Rspeedy supports Less via plugin)
Keep component API (props, events, slots) compatible with Vant where possible
Each story: implement component, create demo page, browser verify side-by-side with Vant web demo
verificationPattern: 3. Compare visually: layout, colors, typography, spacing
4. Compare interaction: tap, toggle, input, animation

userStories.title: Setup vant-lynx example project
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize with Rspeedy + VueLynx template (reference examples/hello-world)
Configure Less support: add less and @aspect-dev/rsbuild-plugin-less, update rspeedy.config.ts
Set up Vue Router for component demo pages
Create src/pages/index.vue as component gallery with links to all component demos
Create src/components/ directory for Vant component implementations
Install dependencies: cd examples/vant-lynx && pnpm install
Verify: pnpm dev:web starts without errors
Browser verify: http://localhost:3000 shows gallery index page
Commit: 'feat(vant-lynx): initial project setup with Less and Vue Router'
Configure vitest with vue-lynx-testing-library (reference examples/hello-world or vue-lynx testing docs)
Add test script to package.json: pnpm test
Verify: pnpm test runs without errors (no tests yet is OK)

userStories.title: Button component
acceptanceCriteria: Props: type, size, plain, round, square, disabled, loading, icon
Port button styles from Vant Less
Port tests from Vant src/button/test/ to vue-lynx-testing-library
Create test file in src/components/ for this component
Verify: pnpm test passes for this component
